production_efficiency_index.helper: Overall equipment effectiveness (OEE) or similar lean metric; higher values reduce waste and emissions.

compliance_readiness_score.label: Compliance Readiness Score
compliance_readiness_score.helper: Assessment of data collection, reporting systems, and verification readiness per CBAM requirements.

industry_benchmark_intensity.label: Industry Benchmark Intensity
industry_benchmark_intensity.helper: Best available technology (BAT) or sector average carbon intensity for benchmarking (ISO 50001).

emission_scope.label: Emission Scope
emission_scope.helper: Defines which emission scopes are included in the carbon intensity calculation.

use_verified_data.label: Use Verified Data Only
use_verified_data.helper: If true, only data from verified sources (e.g., accredited verifier) is used; otherwise estimated data may be included.

celsius_input.label: Temperature in Celsius
celsius_input.helper: Process temperature reading from sensor or manual measurement. Must be above absolute zero.

sensor_accuracy.label: Sensor Accuracy (±°C)
sensor_accuracy.helper: Manufacturer-specified accuracy of the temperature sensor (ISO 17025 calibration standard).

calibration_offset.label: Calibration Offset
calibration_offset.helper: Field calibration adjustment to align sensor with reference standard (NIST traceable).

unit_system.label: Target Unit System
unit_system.helper: Select output temperature scale for downstream process or reporting (ISO 80000-5).

enable_alerts.label: Enable Process Alerts
enable_alerts.helper: Toggle threshold-based alerts for out-of-spec temperature conditions (Six Sigma control limits).

changeover_time_matrix.label: Changeover Time Matrix (minutes)
changeover_time_matrix.helper: Average time to switch from one product to another within the same production line. Based on SMED (Single-Minute Exchange of Die) standards.

number_of_changeovers_per_month.label: Number of Changeovers per Month
number_of_changeovers_per_month.placeholder: Enter number of changeovers per month
number_of_changeovers_per_month.helper: Total changeovers performed monthly across all shifts. Used to calculate total changeover downtime.

setup_external_time.label: External Setup Time per Changeover (minutes)
setup_external_time.placeholder: Enter external setup time per changeover (minutes)
setup_external_time.helper: Setup activities that can be performed while the machine is running (e.g., tool preparation). Target for SMED optimization.

setup_internal_time.label: Internal Setup Time per Changeover (minutes)
setup_internal_time.placeholder: Enter internal setup time per changeover (minutes)
setup_internal_time.helper: Setup activities that require the machine to be stopped. Primary target for reduction via SMED.

product_family_count.label: Number of Product Families
product_family_count.helper: Distinct product groups processed on the line. Higher counts increase changeover complexity.

standard_deviation_changeover_time.label: Standard Deviation of Changeover Time (minutes)
standard_deviation_changeover_time.placeholder: Enter standard deviation of changeover time (minutes)
standard_deviation_changeover_time.helper: Measure of variability in changeover times. Used for Six Sigma process capability analysis.

shift_pattern.label: Shift Pattern
shift_pattern.helper: Operating schedule affecting available production time and changeover frequency.

lean_smed_implemented.label: SMED Implementation Status
lean_smed_implemented.helper: Indicates whether Single-Minute Exchange of Die principles have been formally applied.

target_changeover_time.label: Target Changeover Time (minutes)
target_changeover_time.helper: SMED target for changeover time reduction. Typically <10 minutes for world-class performance.

cutting_speed.label: Cutting Speed (Vc)
cutting_speed.helper: ISO 8688-1: Surface speed of the cutting tool relative to workpiece.

depth_of_cut.label: Depth of Cut (ap)
depth_of_cut.helper: ISO 8688-1: Radial engagement of the tool.

tool_overhang.label: Tool Overhang (L)
tool_overhang.helper: ISO 3685: Free length of tool holder; affects stiffness.

tool_diameter.label: Tool Diameter (D)
tool_diameter.helper: ISO 3685: Cutter diameter for milling or turning insert diameter.

workpiece_material_hardness.label: Workpiece Material Hardness
workpiece_material_hardness.helper: ISO 18265: Brinell hardness; affects cutting force and chatter.

machine_spindle_power.label: Machine Spindle Power (P_m)
machine_spindle_power.helper: ISO 841: Rated power of the spindle motor.

machine_damping_ratio.label: Machine Damping Ratio (ζ)
machine_damping_ratio.helper: ISO 10816: Structural damping; 0.02-0.08 typical for machine tools.

tool_material.label: Tool Material
tool_material.helper: ISO 513: Tool substrate affects wear and stiffness.

coolant_application.label: Coolant Application
coolant_application.helper: ISO 13743: Flood coolant reduces thermal effects and can alter chatter.

total_sq_ft.label: Total Area (sq ft)
total_sq_ft.helper: Total cleanable floor area in square feet. Basis for all labor and material calculations.

cleaning_frequency.label: Cleaning Frequency per Week
cleaning_frequency.helper: Number of times the facility is cleaned per week. Affects labor and consumable usage.

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor Rate ($/hour)
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Hourly wage for cleaning staff. Includes base pay, not burden.

labor_burden_percent.label: Labor Burden (%)
labor_burden_percent.helper: Percentage added to labor rate for taxes, insurance, benefits. Typical range 15-35%.

productivity_sqft_per_hour.label: Productivity Rate (sq ft/hour)
productivity_sqft_per_hour.helper: Average area cleaned per person per hour. Based on industry benchmarks (ISSA, BSCAI).

material_cost_per_sqft.label: Material Cost ($/sq ft)
material_cost_per_sqft.helper: Cost of cleaning chemicals, paper, and consumables per square foot per cleaning.

equipment_cost_per_sqft.label: Equipment Cost ($/sq ft)
equipment_cost_per_sqft.helper: Amortized equipment cost (mops, vacuums, buffers) per square foot per cleaning.

overhead_percent.label: Overhead (%)
overhead_percent.helper: Indirect costs (management, office, insurance) as percentage of direct costs.

desired_margin_percent.label: Desired Profit Margin (%)
desired_margin_percent.helper: Target net profit margin on the bid.

waste_factor_percent.label: Waste Factor (%)
waste_factor_percent.helper: Allowance for material waste, rework, and inefficiency (Lean Six Sigma waste reduction).

quality_level.label: Quality Level
quality_level.helper: Service quality tier. Affects labor productivity and material usage. Healthcare adds 15% to labor.

use_lean_methods.label: Use Lean Methods (5S, Standard Work)
use_lean_methods.placeholder: Enter use lean methods (5s, standard work)
use_lean_methods.helper: If true, applies 10% productivity improvement via Lean techniques.

api_call_volume.label: Monthly API Call Volume
api_call_volume.helper: Total number of API calls made per month, including successful and overrun calls.

overrun_rate.label: Overrun Rate
overrun_rate.helper: Percentage of API calls that exceed the agreed response time threshold (e.g., >200ms).

avg_overrun_duration.label: Average Overrun Duration
avg_overrun_duration.helper: Average extra time beyond the SLA threshold for overrun calls.

cost_per_call.label: Cost per API Call
cost_per_call.helper: Direct cost per API call (compute, network, storage).

retry_cost_per_call.label: Retry Cost per Call
retry_cost_per_call.helper: Additional cost incurred when a call is retried due to timeout or error.

retry_rate.label: Retry Rate
retry_rate.helper: Percentage of overrun calls that trigger a retry.

data_egress_gb.label: Monthly Data Egress
data_egress_gb.helper: Total data transferred out of the cloud per month.

egress_cost_per_gb.label: Egress Cost per GB
egress_cost_per_gb.helper: Cost per GB of data egress (varies by provider and region).

sla_penalty_percentage.label: SLA Penalty Percentage
sla_penalty_percentage.helper: Percentage of monthly service fee credited as penalty if SLA is breached.

monthly_service_fee.label: Monthly Service Fee
monthly_service_fee.helper: Base monthly fee paid to the cloud provider.

overrun_threshold_ms.label: Overrun Threshold (SLA)
overrun_threshold_ms.helper: Maximum acceptable response time per the SLA.

region.label: Cloud Region
region.helper: Geographic region of the cloud service, affects egress costs and latency.

include_hidden_costs.label: Include Hidden Costs (e.g., opportunity loss)
include_hidden_costs.placeholder: Enter include hidden costs (e.g., opportunity loss)
include_hidden_costs.helper: If true, adds estimated hidden costs like customer churn and brand impact.

total_cloud_spend.label: Total Cloud Spend (Monthly)
total_cloud_spend.helper: Total monthly cloud infrastructure cost across all services.

compute_utilization_rate.label: Average Compute Utilization Rate
compute_utilization_rate.helper: Average CPU/memory utilization across all compute instances.

storage_waste_percentage.label: Storage Waste Percentage
storage_waste_percentage.helper: Estimated percentage of storage that is orphaned, unused, or over-provisioned.

idle_resource_count.label: Idle Resource Count
idle_resource_count.helper: Number of compute instances that have been idle for more than 7 days.

data_transfer_out_gb.label: Monthly Data Transfer Out
data_transfer_out_gb.helper: Total outbound data transfer volume per month.

reserved_instance_coverage.label: Reserved Instance Coverage
reserved_instance_coverage.helper: Percentage of compute spend covered by reserved or savings plans.

rightsizing_opportunity_score.label: Rightsizing Opportunity Score
rightsizing_opportunity_score.helper: Aggregate score (0-100) indicating potential savings from instance type adjustments.

cloud_provider.label: Cloud Provider
cloud_provider.helper: Primary cloud provider for cost analysis.

include_network_waste.label: Include Network Waste Analysis
include_network_waste.helper: Toggle to include network-related waste (e.g., data transfer, load balancer inefficiencies).

avg_order_value.label: Average Order Value (AOV)
avg_order_value.helper: Mean revenue per transaction. Used in CLV calculation. Typical range: $20-$200 for B2C, $500-$5000 for B2B.

purchase_frequency.label: Purchase Frequency per Year
purchase_frequency.helper: Number of purchases per customer per year. Derived from historical data or cohort analysis.

customer_lifetime_years.label: Customer Lifetime (Years)
customer_lifetime_years.helper: Average retention period. For subscription models, use 1/churn rate.

gross_margin_pct.label: Gross Margin (%)
gross_margin_pct.helper: Profit margin after COGS. Typical range: 30-70% for product businesses, 60-90% for SaaS.

cac_total.label: Total Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC)
cac_total.helper: Sum of all marketing and sales costs divided by number of new customers. Includes ad spend, salaries, tools.

retention_rate.label: Annual Retention Rate
retention_rate.helper: Percentage of customers retained year over year. Used for churn adjustment. Industry benchmark: 60-90%.

discount_rate.label: Discount Rate (Annual)
discount_rate.helper: Cost of capital or required rate of return. Typical range: 8-15%.

data_confidence.label: Data Confidence Level
data_confidence.helper: Subjective assessment of input data reliability. Low = estimates, High = audited data.

include_churn_adjustment.label: Include Churn Adjustment
include_churn_adjustment.helper: If true, uses retention rate to adjust CLV for churn. Recommended for subscription models.

length_cm.label: Length in Centimeters
length_cm.helper: Measured length in centimeters, typically from calipers, rulers, or CAD models.

measurement_uncertainty.label: Measurement Uncertainty
measurement_uncertainty.helper: Estimated uncertainty of the measurement (e.g., ±0.05 cm for standard calipers).

conversion_precision.label: Conversion Precision
conversion_precision.helper: Select the conversion factor precision based on industry standard (ISO 80000-1, NIST).

tolerance_class.label: Tolerance Class
tolerance_class.helper: Tolerance class for dimensional inspection per ISO 2768. Affects alert thresholds.

unit_cost_per_inch.label: Unit Cost per Inch
unit_cost_per_inch.helper: Cost per inch of material or product, used for cost estimation in Lean/Six Sigma projects.

batch_quantity.label: Batch Quantity
batch_quantity.helper: Number of units in the batch for total cost and waste calculations.

material_type.label: Material Type
material_type.helper: Material selection directly impacts tool wear, cutting speed, and cost per part.

part_weight_kg.label: Part Weight (kg)
part_weight_kg.helper: Weight of the finished part, used to calculate raw material cost and scrap.

stock_volume_cm3.label: Stock Volume (cm³)
stock_volume_cm3.helper: Volume of raw material block before machining, determines material usage.

machining_time_min.label: Machining Time (minutes)
machining_time_min.helper: Total cycle time per part including cutting, tool changes, and rapid moves.

setup_time_min.label: Setup Time (minutes)
setup_time_min.helper: Time to fixture, align, and program the machine for the batch.

batch_size.label: Batch Size (parts)
batch_size.helper: Number of identical parts produced in one production run.

machine_hourly_rate_usd.label: Machine Hourly Rate ($/hr)
machine_hourly_rate_usd.helper: Fully burdened machine cost including depreciation, maintenance, and energy.

labor_hourly_rate_usd.label: Labor Hourly Rate ($/hr)
labor_hourly_rate_usd.helper: Operator wage including overhead and benefits.

tooling_cost_per_part_usd.label: Tooling Cost per Part ($)
tooling_cost_per_part_usd.helper: Consumable tooling cost allocated per part (inserts, drills, end mills).

overhead_percentage.label: Overhead Percentage (%)
overhead_percentage.helper: Facility, quality, and administrative overhead as a percentage of direct costs.

scrap_rate_percent.label: Scrap Rate (%)
scrap_rate_percent.helper: Percentage of parts that fail inspection and are scrapped.

material_cost_per_kg_usd.label: Material Cost per kg ($/kg)
material_cost_per_kg_usd.helper: Price of raw material per kilogram, varies by material type.

density_g_per_cm3.label: Density (g/cm³)
density_g_per_cm3.helper: Material density used to convert volume to weight.

annual_manual_labor_cost.label: Annual Manual Labor Cost (per FTE)
annual_manual_labor_cost.placeholder: Enter annual manual labor cost (per fte)
annual_manual_labor_cost.helper: Total annual cost per full-time equivalent worker including wages, benefits, and overhead.

number_of_workers.label: Number of Workers Replaced
number_of_workers.helper: Number of manual workers that could be replaced or augmented by one cobot.

cobot_purchase_price.label: Cobot Purchase Price
cobot_purchase_price.helper: Initial capital expenditure for the cobot including end-effector and controller.

cobot_annual_maintenance.label: Cobot Annual Maintenance Cost
cobot_annual_maintenance.helper: Annual service contract, spare parts, and software updates.

cobot_lifespan_years.label: Cobot Lifespan
cobot_lifespan_years.helper: Expected operational life before major overhaul or replacement.

discount_rate.label: Discount Rate (WACC)
discount_rate.helper: Weighted average cost of capital for NPV calculation.

labor_productivity_factor.label: Manual Labor Productivity Factor
labor_productivity_factor.helper: Efficiency factor for manual labor (1.0 = 100% productive, 0.85 = typical with breaks/errors).

cobot_uptime_percent.label: Cobot Uptime
cobot_uptime_percent.helper: Percentage of scheduled time the cobot is operational (excluding planned maintenance).

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Number of shifts per day the cobot will operate (manual labor typically single shift).

include_training_cost.label: Include Cobot Training Cost
include_training_cost.helper: Whether to include initial training and integration costs.

training_cost.label: Cobot Training & Integration Cost
training_cost.helper: One-time cost for programming, safety validation, and operator training.

system_pressure.label: System Pressure
system_pressure.helper: Operating pressure of the compressed air system; higher pressure increases leak flow rate.

leak_diameter.label: Equivalent Leak Diameter
leak_diameter.helper: Diameter of a round orifice representing the average leak size. Common sizes: 1/8", 1/4", 1/2".

number_of_leaks.label: Number of Leaks
number_of_leaks.helper: Total number of identified or estimated leaks in the system.

operating_hours.label: Annual Operating Hours
operating_hours.helper: Total hours the compressor runs per year. Continuous operation = 8760 h.

electricity_cost.label: Electricity Cost
electricity_cost.helper: Average blended cost of electricity per kilowatt-hour.

compressor_efficiency.label: Compressor Efficiency
compressor_efficiency.helper: Overall efficiency of the compressor system (motor + drive + compressor). Typical range 70-85%.

leak_type.label: Leak Type
leak_type.helper: Geometry of the leak affects discharge coefficient. Round orifice is most common.

include_maintenance_cost.label: Include Maintenance Cost
include_maintenance_cost.helper: If true, adds estimated labor and material cost for leak repair.

compressorflowrate.label: Compressor Flow Rate
compressorflowrate.helper: Rated free air delivery of the compressor at standard conditions.

demandflowrate.label: Average Demand Flow Rate
demandflowrate.helper: Average compressed air consumption of the system.

peakduration.label: Peak Demand Duration
peakduration.helper: Duration of the peak demand event.

systempressure.label: System Operating Pressure
systempressure.helper: Nominal pressure at which the system operates.

pressuredifferential.label: Allowable Pressure Differential
pressuredifferential.helper: Maximum acceptable pressure drop during peak event.

compressorcontroltype.label: Compressor Control Type
compressorcontroltype.helper: Type of compressor capacity control, affects tank sizing factor.

ambienttemperature.label: Ambient Temperature
ambienttemperature.helper: Average ambient temperature at compressor location.

altitude.label: Altitude Above Sea Level
altitude.helper: Site elevation for air density correction.

systemleakagepercent.label: System Leakage Estimate
systemleakagepercent.helper: Estimated percentage of compressed air lost to leaks.

applicationtype.label: Application Type
applicationtype.helper: Primary use case, influences safety factor.

container_type.label: Container Type
container_type.helper: Select the container type to define internal volume and dimensional constraints per ISO 668.

cargo_length_cm.label: Cargo Length (cm)
cargo_length_cm.helper: Length of the primary cargo unit (pallet or box). Must align with container internal length.

cargo_width_cm.label: Cargo Width (cm)
cargo_width_cm.helper: Width of the cargo unit. Affects lateral stacking and aisle space.

cargo_height_cm.label: Cargo Height (cm)
cargo_height_cm.helper: Height of the cargo unit. Must respect container door height and internal height.

cargo_weight_kg.label: Cargo Weight per Unit (kg)
cargo_weight_kg.helper: Weight per cargo unit. Critical for gross weight limit and axle load distribution.

stacking_factor.label: Stacking Factor
stacking_factor.helper: Number of cargo units that can be stacked vertically, considering crush resistance and stability.

load_secure_method.label: Load Securing Method
load_secure_method.helper: Method used to secure cargo. Affects usable volume and weight distribution per CTU Code.

use_pallet.label: Use Pallet
use_pallet.helper: Indicates if cargo is palletized. Pallet dimensions add to base footprint and reduce usable height.

pallet_height_cm.label: Pallet Height (cm)
pallet_height_cm.helper: Height of the pallet (if used). Added to cargo height for total unit height.

actual_throughput.label: Actual Throughput (units)
actual_throughput.helper: Total units produced or delivered in the measurement period.

defect_rate.label: Defect Rate (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts per million defective, measured per Six Sigma standards.

on_time_delivery_percent.label: On-Time Delivery (%)
on_time_delivery_percent.helper: Percentage of orders delivered on or before the promised date.

cost_per_unit.label: Cost per Unit ($)
cost_per_unit.helper: Total manufacturing cost per unit, including materials, labor, overhead.

target_cost_per_unit.label: Target Cost per Unit ($)
target_cost_per_unit.helper: Contractually agreed cost target per unit.

incentive_base_rate.label: Incentive Base Rate ($/unit)
incentive_base_rate.helper: Base incentive amount per unit, subject to performance multipliers.

quality_threshold_ppm.label: Quality Threshold (ppm)
quality_threshold_ppm.helper: Maximum defect rate to qualify for any incentive.

delivery_threshold_percent.label: Delivery Threshold (%)
delivery_threshold_percent.helper: Minimum on-time delivery percentage to qualify for incentive.

cost_reduction_sharing_percent.label: Cost Reduction Sharing (%)
cost_reduction_sharing_percent.helper: Percentage of cost savings shared as additional incentive.

contract_type.label: Contract Type
contract_type.helper: Type of contract governing the incentive structure.

lean_certification_active.label: Lean Certification Active
lean_certification_active.helper: Indicates if the supplier holds an active Lean certification (e.g., ISO 18404).

cpk.label: Process Capability Index (Cpk)
cpk.helper: Cpk is a standard Six Sigma metric indicating how well a process meets specification limits, accounting for centering. Typical targets: 1.33 (minimum acceptable), 1.67 (good), 2.0 (excellent).

sigmashift.label: Sigma Shift (long-term drift)
sigmashift.helper: Accounts for long-term process drift. Standard Six Sigma assumption is 1.5 sigma shift. Adjust based on historical data or industry norms (e.g., automotive often uses 1.5).

distributiontype.label: Distribution Type
distributiontype.helper: Select distribution based on sample size and data characteristics. Normal for large samples (n>30), t-distribution for small samples (n<30) to account for uncertainty.

samplesize.label: Sample Size (n)
samplesize.helper: Number of observations used to estimate Cpk. Larger samples improve confidence. Required for t-distribution adjustment.

confidencelevel.label: Confidence Level
confidencelevel.helper: Confidence level for the confidence interval of the PPM estimate. Higher levels provide more conservative (wider) intervals.

useconfidenceinterval.label: Use Confidence Interval
useconfidenceinterval.helper: If enabled, the tool calculates lower and upper bounds for PPM based on the confidence level. Useful for risk assessment.

planned_duration_days.label: Planned Duration (Days)
planned_duration_days.helper: Total planned duration of the project from start to finish, as per CPM schedule baseline.

actual_duration_days.label: Actual Duration (Days)
actual_duration_days.helper: Actual elapsed duration from project start to current date or completion.

daily_penalty_rate.label: Daily Penalty Rate (Currency)
daily_penalty_rate.helper: Contractual liquidated damages or penalty per day of delay beyond the planned duration.

critical_path_float_total.label: Total Float on Critical Path (Days)
critical_path_float_total.placeholder: Enter total float on critical path (days)
critical_path_float_total.helper: Sum of total float for all activities on the critical path. Zero or negative indicates schedule compression.

productivity_factor.label: Productivity Factor (0-1)
productivity_factor.helper: Lean metric: ratio of actual output to standard output. Values below 0.8 indicate significant waste.

rework_percentage.label: Rework Percentage (%)
rework_percentage.helper: Percentage of completed work requiring rework, a key Six Sigma quality metric.

delay_type.label: Delay Type
delay_type.helper: Classification per standard construction delay analysis (AACE, SCL protocols).

use_earned_schedule.label: Use Earned Schedule Method
use_earned_schedule.helper: If true, applies earned schedule (ES) metrics for more accurate delay impact assessment.

expected_yield.label: Expected Yield (kg/ha)
expected_yield.helper: Theoretical maximum yield based on seed genetics and local potential.

actual_yield.label: Actual Yield (kg/ha)
actual_yield.helper: Measured yield at harvest, used as baseline for loss calculation.

harvest_loss_pct.label: Harvest Loss (%)
harvest_loss_pct.helper: Percentage of crop lost during harvesting operations (shattering, header loss, etc.).

post_harvest_loss_pct.label: Post-Harvest Loss (%)
post_harvest_loss_pct.helper: Losses during handling, storage, and transport after harvest.

field_condition.label: Field Condition
field_condition.helper: Overall field condition affecting crop uniformity and loss potential.

irrigation_type.label: Irrigation Type
irrigation_type.helper: Irrigation method influences water stress and yield consistency.

pest_pressure.label: Pest Pressure (0-10)
pest_pressure.helper: Subjective rating of pest infestation level (0 = none, 10 = severe).

disease_index.label: Disease Index (0-10)
disease_index.helper: Subjective rating of disease severity (0 = none, 10 = total loss).

weed_cover_pct.label: Weed Cover (%)
weed_cover_pct.helper: Percentage of field area covered by weeds, competing for resources.

soil_quality_score.label: Soil Quality Score (0-100)
soil_quality_score.helper: Aggregate soil health metric (organic matter, pH, structure, etc.).

labor_efficiency.label: Labor Efficiency (0-100)
labor_efficiency.helper: Rating of labor productivity and skill level in field operations.

equipment_reliability.label: Equipment Reliability (0-100)
equipment_reliability.helper: Percentage of time equipment operates without breakdown during critical periods.

exposure_amount.label: Exposure Amount (in base currency)
exposure_amount.helper: Total value of foreign currency receivables or payables subject to exchange rate fluctuation.

volatility_annual.label: Annualized Volatility of Exchange Rate
volatility_annual.placeholder: Enter annualized volatility of exchange rate
volatility_annual.helper: Historical or implied standard deviation of daily log returns annualized (ISO 31000 risk metric).

confidence_level.label: Confidence Level for VaR Calculation
confidence_level.placeholder: Enter confidence level for var calculation
confidence_level.helper: Statistical confidence level used in Value at Risk (VaR) estimation, typical values 90%, 95%, 99%.

hedge_ratio.label: Hedge Ratio
hedge_ratio.helper: Percentage of exposure covered by hedging instruments (forwards, options). Lean metric for waste reduction.

time_horizon_days.label: Time Horizon (days)
time_horizon_days.helper: Risk assessment period aligned with business planning cycles (WERC supply chain standard).

enable_lean_adjustment.label: Enable Lean Volatility Adjustment
enable_lean_adjustment.helper: Applies a Six Sigma-based correction factor to account for process variation in hedging execution.

cutvolume.label: Cut Volume
cutvolume.helper: Total volume of material to be excavated from cut areas, measured in bank cubic meters (BCM).

fillvolume.label: Fill Volume
fillvolume.helper: Total volume of material required for fill/embankment areas, measured in compacted cubic meters (CCM).

swellfactor.label: Swell Factor
swellfactor.helper: Factor accounting for volume increase when material is excavated (loose state vs. bank state). Typical range 1.1–1.4.

shrinkagefactor.label: Shrinkage Factor
shrinkagefactor.helper: Factor accounting for volume decrease when material is compacted (compacted state vs. bank state). Typical range 0.75–0.95.

hauldistance.label: Average Haul Distance
hauldistance.helper: Average one-way distance from cut to fill areas, used for cost and fuel calculations.

unithaulcost.label: Unit Haul Cost
unithaulcost.helper: Cost per cubic meter per kilometer of hauling material, including fuel, labor, and equipment depreciation.

wastedisposalcost.label: Waste Disposal Cost
wastedisposalcost.helper: Cost per cubic meter for disposing excess material at a designated waste site.

borrowcost.label: Borrow Material Cost
borrowcost.helper: Cost per cubic meter to import material from a borrow pit to meet fill deficit.

materialtype.label: Material Type
materialtype.helper: Type of material being moved, affects swell/shrinkage factors and handling difficulty.

useoptimizedhaulroutes.label: Use Optimized Haul Routes
useoptimizedhaulroutes.helper: If enabled, the tool applies lean logistics principles to minimize haul distance and idle time.

cutting_speed.label: Cutting Speed
cutting_speed.helper: Surface speed of the workpiece relative to the cutting tool, based on ISO 3685.

feed_rate.label: Feed Rate
feed_rate.helper: Linear distance the tool advances per revolution, affects chip load and tool wear.

depth_of_cut.label: Depth of Cut
depth_of_cut.helper: Radial or axial engagement of the tool, influences cutting forces and heat generation.

tool_material.label: Tool Material
tool_material.helper: Material of the cutting tool, affects wear resistance and optimal cutting parameters.

workpiece_material.label: Workpiece Material
workpiece_material.helper: Material being machined, determines machinability rating and recommended speeds.

coolant_used.label: Coolant Used
coolant_used.helper: Indicates if coolant is applied, reduces thermal stress and extends tool life.

machine_stability_factor.label: Machine Stability Factor
machine_stability_factor.helper: Factor representing machine rigidity and vibration damping, based on condition monitoring data.

milk_volume_liters.label: Milk Volume (Liters per day)
milk_volume_liters.helper: Total raw milk received daily from suppliers or own herd.

fat_percentage.label: Fat Content (%)
fat_percentage.helper: Average butterfat content of incoming milk, critical for yield calculations.

protein_percentage.label: Protein Content (%)
protein_percentage.helper: Average protein content, affects cheese and powder yields.

selling_price_per_liter.label: Selling Price (per Liter)
selling_price_per_liter.helper: Average revenue per liter of raw milk sold to processor or retail.

production_cost_per_liter.label: Production Cost (per Liter)
production_cost_per_liter.helper: Includes feed, labor, utilities, veterinary, and overhead per liter.

waste_percentage.label: Waste / Shrinkage (%)
waste_percentage.helper: Milk lost due to spoilage, spillage, or quality rejection.

labor_hours_per_day.label: Labor Hours per Day
labor_hours_per_day.helper: Total direct labor hours used in milk production and handling.

energy_cost_per_day.label: Energy Cost (per Day)
energy_cost_per_day.helper: Daily electricity, fuel, and cooling costs.

other_variable_cost_per_liter.label: Other Variable Cost (per Liter)
other_variable_cost_per_liter.helper: Supplies, additives, packaging, and miscellaneous variable costs.

fixed_cost_per_day.label: Fixed Cost (per Day)
fixed_cost_per_day.helper: Depreciation, rent, insurance, and other fixed overhead.

quality_grade.label: Quality Grade
quality_grade.helper: Milk quality grade based on somatic cell count and bacteria (A, B, C).

historical_demand_mean.label: Historical Demand Mean (units/period)
historical_demand_mean.helper: Average demand observed over the past 12 periods (ISO 9001:2015 data collection).

demand_std_dev.label: Demand Standard Deviation (units)
demand_std_dev.helper: Standard deviation of demand, used for safety stock calculation (Lean Six Sigma DMAIC).

lead_time_days.label: Lead Time (days)
lead_time_days.helper: Average replenishment lead time from supplier (WERC DC Metrics).

service_level.label: Target Service Level
service_level.helper: Probability of not stocking out during lead time (Six Sigma DPMO target).

unit_cost.label: Unit Cost ($)
unit_cost.helper: Purchase cost per unit (ISO 14051 material flow cost accounting).

holding_cost_rate.label: Annual Holding Cost Rate (%)
holding_cost_rate.helper: Percentage of unit cost per year (WERC DC Measures, typical 20-30%).

ordering_cost.label: Ordering Cost ($/order)
ordering_cost.helper: Fixed cost per purchase order (Lean transactional cost reduction).

stockout_cost_per_unit.label: Stockout Cost per Unit ($)
stockout_cost_per_unit.helper: Lost profit + penalty per unit of unmet demand (Six Sigma cost of poor quality).

periods_per_year.label: Periods per Year
periods_per_year.helper: Number of demand periods in a year (e.g., 12 for monthly, 52 for weekly).

use_abc_classification.label: Use ABC Classification
use_abc_classification.helper: If true, applies ABC analysis to adjust service level (Pareto principle in inventory management).

twin_scope.label: Digital Twin Scope
twin_scope.helper: Select the scope of the digital twin: asset, process, system, or enterprise. Influences complexity and cost multipliers.

asset_count.label: Number of Assets/Entities
asset_count.helper: Total number of physical assets or entities to be modeled in the digital twin.

sensor_density.label: Sensor Density (sensors per asset)
sensor_density.helper: Average number of IoT sensors per asset. Higher density increases data acquisition and processing costs.

data_frequency.label: Data Acquisition Frequency
data_frequency.helper: Frequency of data collection: 0.1 (every 10s), 1 (per second), 10 (10 Hz), 100 (100 Hz). Higher frequency increases data volume and cost.

integration_complexity.label: Integration Complexity
integration_complexity.helper: Complexity of integrating with existing systems (ERP, MES, CMMS). Low, medium, high. Affects labor and software costs.

data_quality_index.label: Data Quality Index (DQI)
data_quality_index.helper: Percentage of data that is accurate, complete, and timely. Based on ISO 8000 data quality standards.

labor_rate.label: Average Labor Rate (USD/hour)
labor_rate.helper: Blended hourly rate for engineering and IT staff involved in digital twin development and maintenance.

expected_lifespan.label: Expected Lifespan (years)
expected_lifespan.helper: Expected operational lifespan of the digital twin system. Used for amortization and total cost of ownership calculations.

lean_six_sigma_level.label: Lean Six Sigma Maturity Level
lean_six_sigma_level.placeholder: Enter lean six sigma maturity level
lean_six_sigma_level.helper: Organizational maturity in Lean Six Sigma: level1 (initial), level2 (managed), level3 (defined), level4 (quantitatively managed), level5 (optimizing). Affects efficiency and waste reduction.

werc_benchmark.label: WERC DC Benchmark (cost per order)
werc_benchmark.placeholder: Enter werc dc benchmark (cost per order)
werc_benchmark.helper: Warehouse Education and Research Council (WERC) benchmark for average cost per order in distribution centers.

planned_production_rate.label: Planned Production Rate
planned_production_rate.helper: The standard output rate per hour under normal operating conditions (ISO 22400).

downtime_duration.label: Downtime Duration
downtime_duration.helper: Total duration of the unplanned downtime event.

revenue_per_unit.label: Revenue per Unit
revenue_per_unit.helper: Selling price or standard cost per unit of output.

direct_labor_cost_per_hour.label: Direct Labor Cost per Hour
direct_labor_cost_per_hour.placeholder: Enter direct labor cost per hour
direct_labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Average hourly wage including benefits for operators affected by downtime.

energy_cost_per_hour.label: Energy Cost per Hour
energy_cost_per_hour.helper: Average cost of electricity, gas, or other energy consumed during production.

scrap_rate_during_downtime.label: Scrap Rate During Downtime
scrap_rate_during_downtime.helper: Percentage of material wasted due to restart or instability after downtime (Six Sigma defect rate).

recovery_time_factor.label: Recovery Time Factor
recovery_time_factor.helper: Multiplier for additional time needed to return to steady-state production (Lean Takt time recovery).

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Shift during which downtime occurred; affects labor cost multipliers (night/weekend premiums).

include_quality_loss.label: Include Quality Loss
include_quality_loss.helper: If true, adds cost of scrap and rework caused by the downtime event.

dye_volume_l.label: Dye bath volume (liters)
dye_volume_l.helper: Total volume of dye liquor in the batch.

dye_concentration_gpl.label: Dye concentration (g/L)
dye_concentration_gpl.helper: Grams of dye powder per liter of bath.

chemicals_per_liter.label: Auxiliary chemicals cost (USD/L)
chemicals_per_liter.helper: Cost of salts, acids, bases, etc., per liter of bath.

energy_cost_per_batch.label: Energy cost per batch (USD)
energy_cost_per_batch.helper: Electricity, steam, or gas cost for heating and running the dyeing machine.

batch_time_hours.label: Batch cycle time (hours)
batch_time_hours.helper: Total time from loading to unloading.

waste_percentage.label: Waste / rework rate (%)
waste_percentage.helper: Percentage of batches that require re-dyeing or are scrapped.

water_cost_per_m3.label: Water cost (USD/m³)
water_cost_per_m3.helper: Cost of fresh water and wastewater treatment.

water_usage_l_per_kg.label: Water usage (L/kg fabric)
water_usage_l_per_kg.helper: Typical water consumption per kg of fabric processed.

fabric_weight_kg.label: Fabric weight (kg)
fabric_weight_kg.helper: Weight of fabric in the batch.

dye_type.label: Dye class
dye_type.helper: Chemical class of dye, affects fixation efficiency and cost.

use_lean_optimization.label: Enable Lean optimization (reduce waste)
use_lean_optimization.helper: If true, applies lean principles to reduce waste and rework.

total_energy_kwh.label: Total Energy Consumption (kWh)
total_energy_kwh.helper: Total electrical energy consumed by the facility over the reporting period (e.g., monthly).

peak_demand_kw.label: Peak Demand (kW)
peak_demand_kw.helper: Highest recorded power demand during the period; used for demand charge calculation.

tariff_rate_per_kwh.label: Energy Rate ($/kWh)
tariff_rate_per_kwh.helper: Average cost per kWh from utility bill (blended rate).

demand_charge_per_kw.label: Demand Charge ($/kW)
demand_charge_per_kw.helper: Utility demand charge per kW of peak demand.

production_units.label: Total Production Units
production_units.helper: Number of units produced in the period (e.g., pieces, kg, liters).

facility_type.label: Facility Type
facility_type.helper: Type of facility for benchmarking and normalization.

include_renewable_offset.label: Include Renewable Energy Offset
include_renewable_offset.helper: If true, subtracts renewable generation from total consumption for net cost calculation.

renewable_kwh.label: Renewable Energy Generated (kWh)
renewable_kwh.helper: On-site renewable generation (solar, wind) during the period.

co2_emission_factor.label: CO2 Emission Factor (kg CO2/kWh)
co2_emission_factor.helper: Grid average emission factor for the region (ISO 14064).

waste_type.label: Waste Type
waste_type.helper: Select the category of waste to apply appropriate cost factors and regulatory thresholds.

waste_volume_kg.label: Waste Volume (kg)
waste_volume_kg.helper: Total mass of waste generated in the reporting period.

disposal_cost_per_kg.label: Disposal Cost per kg
disposal_cost_per_kg.helper: Average cost paid to waste management vendor per kilogram.

transport_distance_km.label: Transport Distance (km)
transport_distance_km.helper: One-way distance from facility to disposal or recycling site.

transport_cost_per_km.label: Transport Cost per km
transport_cost_per_km.helper: Cost per kilometer for waste transport, including fuel and labor.

labor_hours_per_ton.label: Labor Hours per Ton
labor_hours_per_ton.helper: Direct labor hours required to handle, sort, and prepare one ton of waste.

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor Rate per Hour
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Hourly wage including overhead for waste handling personnel.

recycling_revenue_per_kg.label: Recycling Revenue per kg
recycling_revenue_per_kg.helper: Revenue received from selling recyclable materials per kilogram.

recycling_rate.label: Recycling Rate (%)
recycling_rate.helper: Percentage of total waste that is diverted to recycling.

carbon_cost_per_kg_co2.label: Carbon Cost per kg CO2e
carbon_cost_per_kg_co2.placeholder: Enter carbon cost per kg co2e
carbon_cost_per_kg_co2.helper: Internal or regulatory cost assigned to each kg of CO2 equivalent emissions.

emission_factor_kg_co2_per_kg_waste.label: Emission Factor (kg CO2e/kg waste)
emission_factor_kg_co2_per_kg_waste.helper: Average greenhouse gas emissions per kilogram of waste based on waste type and disposal method.

compliance_penalty_per_kg.label: Compliance Penalty per kg
compliance_penalty_per_kg.helper: Potential regulatory fines or penalties per kilogram if waste exceeds permitted limits.

waste_volume_limit_kg.label: Waste Volume Limit (kg)
waste_volume_limit_kg.helper: Regulatory or internal threshold for waste volume before penalties apply.

annual_demand.label: Annual Demand (units)
annual_demand.helper: Total forecasted demand for the item over one year. Used to calculate order frequency and total cycle stock.

ordering_cost.label: Ordering Cost per Order
ordering_cost.helper: Fixed cost incurred per purchase order (e.g., administrative, inspection, transportation setup).

holding_cost_per_unit.label: Holding Cost per Unit per Year
holding_cost_per_unit.placeholder: Enter holding cost per unit per year
holding_cost_per_unit.helper: Cost to hold one unit in inventory for one year, including storage, insurance, obsolescence, and capital cost.

unit_cost.label: Unit Cost (Purchase Price)
unit_cost.helper: Purchase price per unit from supplier. Used to calculate total annual purchase cost and capital tied up.

lead_time_days.label: Lead Time (days)
lead_time_days.helper: Average time from order placement to receipt. Critical for safety stock and reorder point calculations.

demand_variability.label: Demand Variability (Std Dev of Daily Demand)
demand_variability.placeholder: Enter demand variability (std dev of daily demand)
demand_variability.helper: Standard deviation of daily demand. Used to calculate safety stock under uncertainty (Six Sigma approach).

service_level.label: Desired Service Level
service_level.helper: Target probability of not stocking out during lead time. Higher service levels increase safety stock.

backorder_cost.label: Backorder Cost per Unit
backorder_cost.helper: Cost incurred per unit when demand cannot be met from stock (lost sales, penalty, expediting).

warehouse_capacity.label: Warehouse Capacity (units)
warehouse_capacity.helper: Maximum storage capacity available for this item. Used to constrain order quantity if EOQ exceeds capacity.

storage_cost_per_sqft.label: Storage Cost per sq ft per Year
storage_cost_per_sqft.placeholder: Enter storage cost per sq ft per year
storage_cost_per_sqft.helper: Cost per square foot of warehouse space per year. Used for space-based holding cost adjustments.

item_footprint.label: Item Footprint (sq ft per unit)
item_footprint.placeholder: Enter item footprint (sq ft per unit)
item_footprint.helper: Average floor space required per unit of inventory. Used to compute space cost component.

bac.label: Budget at Completion
bac.helper: Total authorized budget for the work scope (PMBOK).

ev.label: Earned Value
ev.helper: Value of work actually performed, measured in budgeted cost.

ac.label: Actual Cost
ac.helper: Total cost incurred for the work performed.

pv.label: Planned Value
pv.helper: Authorized budget for the work scheduled to be completed.

percentcomplete.label: Percent Complete (physical)
percentcomplete.helper: Objective physical progress estimate (e.g., via earned value rules).

cpi.label: Cost Performance Index (override)
cpi.helper: If provided, overrides calculated CPI. CPI = EV/AC.

spi.label: Schedule Performance Index (override)
spi.helper: If provided, overrides calculated SPI. SPI = EV/PV.

useweightedmethod.label: Use weighted CPI/SPI for EAC
useweightedmethod.placeholder: Enter use weighted cpi/spi for eac
useweightedmethod.helper: If true, applies 0.8*CPI + 0.2*SPI weighting for EAC (industry practice).

managementreserve.label: Management Reserve
managementreserve.helper: Reserve held for unforeseen scope changes (not part of BAC).

fabric_width.label: Fabric Width (cm)
fabric_width.helper: Standard industrial fabric roll width, typically 150-320 cm for apparel and upholstery.

fabric_length.label: Fabric Length (m)
fabric_length.helper: Total length of fabric roll or batch, used to compute total area.

pattern_length.label: Pattern Length (cm)
pattern_length.helper: Length of one garment or component pattern piece along the grain.

pattern_width.label: Pattern Width (cm)
pattern_width.helper: Width of one pattern piece perpendicular to the grain.

quantity.label: Quantity to Cut
quantity.helper: Number of identical pieces to be cut from the fabric.

cutting_method.label: Cutting Method
cutting_method.helper: Method affects material utilization and labor cost. Single-ply is manual; multi-ply is automated.

material_cost_per_m2.label: Material Cost per m²
material_cost_per_m2.helper: Cost of fabric per square meter, used for financial loss calculations.

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor Rate per Hour
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Hourly wage of cutting operator, used for labor cost estimation.

allowance_percentage.label: Allowance Percentage (%)
allowance_percentage.helper: Extra fabric allowance for seam, shrinkage, or alignment tolerances per ISO 4915.

use_nesting.label: Enable Nesting Optimization
use_nesting.helper: If true, the optimizer will attempt to nest patterns to reduce waste.

num_departments.label: Number of Departments
num_departments.helper: Total distinct production or storage areas in the facility.

flow_intensity_matrix.label: Flow Intensity Matrix (triangular, comma-separated per row)
flow_intensity_matrix.placeholder: Enter flow intensity matrix (triangular, comma-separated per row)
flow_intensity_matrix.helper: Number of material movements between each pair of departments per day.

distance_matrix.label: Distance Matrix (triangular, comma-separated per row)
distance_matrix.placeholder: Enter distance matrix (triangular, comma-separated per row)
distance_matrix.helper: Current or proposed travel distances between department centroids.

path_efficiency_factor.label: Path Efficiency Factor
path_efficiency_factor.helper: Ratio of straight-line distance to actual travel path (1.0 = perfect straight line).

layout_type.label: Layout Type
layout_type.helper: Classification of the facility layout according to standard industrial engineering taxonomy.

use_weighted_distance.label: Use Weighted Distance (Flow × Distance)
use_weighted_distance.helper: If true, the primary result is the sum of flow × distance; otherwise raw distance sum.

recycling_machine_cost.label: Recycling Machine Purchase Cost
recycling_machine_cost.helper: Capital expenditure for the recycling extruder/pelletizer system.

machine_life_years.label: Machine Useful Life
machine_life_years.helper: Expected operational life before major overhaul or replacement.

annual_maintenance_cost.label: Annual Maintenance Cost
annual_maintenance_cost.helper: Routine maintenance, spare parts, and service contracts.

recycling_energy_consumption.label: Recycling Energy Consumption
recycling_energy_consumption.helper: Energy required per kg of recycled filament produced.

labor_rate.label: Labor Rate
labor_rate.helper: Hourly wage including benefits for operator.

labor_hours_per_kg.label: Labor Hours per kg
labor_hours_per_kg.helper: Direct labor time to process one kg of recycled filament.

waste_collection_cost.label: Waste Collection Cost
waste_collection_cost.helper: Cost to collect and transport scrap plastic to recycling facility.

virgin_filament_price.label: Virgin Filament Market Price
virgin_filament_price.helper: Current market price for virgin PLA/ABS/PETG filament.

recycling_yield.label: Recycling Yield
recycling_yield.helper: Percentage of input waste that becomes usable filament (losses due to contamination, degradation).

quality_factor.label: Quality Factor (vs Virgin)
quality_factor.helper: Relative mechanical/print quality of recycled filament compared to virgin (e.g., 90% means 10% more material needed for same strength).

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production Volume
annual_production_volume.helper: Total kg of recycled filament produced per year.

waste_type.label: Waste Type
waste_type.helper: Type of plastic waste being recycled; affects processing parameters and yield.

include_carbon_cost.label: Include Carbon Cost
include_carbon_cost.helper: If true, adds a carbon penalty cost based on estimated emissions.

carbon_price.label: Carbon Price
carbon_price.helper: Social cost of carbon or carbon tax per metric ton of CO2 equivalent.

static_pressure.label: Static Pressure
static_pressure.helper: Measured at hydrant outlet with no flow. Used to determine available system pressure per NFPA 291.

residual_pressure.label: Residual Pressure
residual_pressure.helper: Pressure measured while hydrant is flowing at test rate. Indicates system capacity under demand.

flow_rate_test.label: Test Flow Rate
flow_rate_test.helper: Flow rate measured during hydrant flow test using pitot gauge or flow meter.

pipe_diameter.label: Supply Pipe Diameter
pipe_diameter.helper: Nominal diameter of the main supply pipe feeding the hydrant. Affects friction loss.

pipe_length.label: Supply Pipe Length
pipe_length.helper: Distance from water main to hydrant. Used in friction loss calculations.

hazen_williams_coefficient.label: Hazen-Williams C Factor
hazen_williams_coefficient.helper: Pipe roughness coefficient. 140 for new steel, 100 for old cast iron. Per ISO 10803 and NFPA 13.

elevation_difference.label: Elevation Difference
elevation_difference.helper: Height difference between water source and hydrant. Positive if hydrant is above source.

number_of_hydrants.label: Number of Hydrants in Test
number_of_hydrants.placeholder: Enter number of hydrants in test
number_of_hydrants.helper: Number of hydrants flowing simultaneously during test. Affects total demand.

hydrant_type.label: Hydrant Type
hydrant_type.helper: Type of hydrant per NFPA 291. Dry barrel common in cold climates.

flow_condition.label: Flow Condition
flow_condition.helper: Steady for normal tests, Transient for surge analysis per ISO 4126.

is_test_standard.label: NFPA 291 Compliant Test
is_test_standard.helper: Indicates if flow test was performed per NFPA 291 standard procedures.

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production Volume
annual_production_volume.helper: Total number of units produced per year across all product variants.

avg_batch_size.label: Average Batch Size
avg_batch_size.helper: Average number of units produced per production run before changeover.

current_setup_time.label: Current Setup Time per Changeover
current_setup_time.placeholder: Enter current setup time per changeover
current_setup_time.helper: Time required to change from one product to another in the current system.

target_setup_time.label: Target Setup Time per Changeover (after FMS)
target_setup_time.placeholder: Enter target setup time per changeover (after fms)
target_setup_time.helper: Expected setup time after implementing flexible manufacturing system (e.g., SMED).

hourly_operating_cost.label: Hourly Operating Cost (labor + overhead)
hourly_operating_cost.helper: Fully burdened hourly cost of production labor and overhead.

changeover_cost_per_hour.label: Changeover Cost per Hour (downtime + labor)
changeover_cost_per_hour.placeholder: Enter changeover cost per hour (downtime + labor)
changeover_cost_per_hour.helper: Total cost incurred per hour of changeover, including lost production and labor.

inventory_holding_cost_rate.label: Inventory Holding Cost Rate
inventory_holding_cost_rate.helper: Annual cost to hold inventory as a percentage of inventory value (includes storage, insurance, obsolescence).

avg_inventory_value.label: Average Inventory Value (current)
avg_inventory_value.helper: Current average value of raw materials, WIP, and finished goods inventory.

fms_investment.label: Total FMS Investment
fms_investment.helper: Total capital expenditure for flexible manufacturing system (equipment, software, training, integration).

fms_useful_life.label: FMS Useful Life
fms_useful_life.helper: Expected operational life of the flexible manufacturing system for depreciation purposes.

discount_rate.label: Discount Rate (WACC)
discount_rate.helper: Weighted average cost of capital used for net present value calculation.

product_variants.label: Number of Product Variants
product_variants.helper: Total number of distinct product variants produced annually.

quality_defect_rate.label: Current Quality Defect Rate
quality_defect_rate.helper: Percentage of units that are defective and require rework or scrap.

fms_quality_improvement.label: Expected Quality Improvement from FMS
fms_quality_improvement.placeholder: Enter expected quality improvement from fms
fms_quality_improvement.helper: Expected percentage reduction in defect rate after implementing FMS.

cost_per_defect.label: Cost per Defect (rework + scrap)
cost_per_defect.helper: Average cost to rework or scrap a defective unit.

labor_productivity_gain.label: Labor Productivity Gain from FMS
labor_productivity_gain.placeholder: Enter labor productivity gain from fms
labor_productivity_gain.helper: Expected percentage increase in labor productivity due to automation and reduced manual handling.

floor_space_reduction.label: Floor Space Reduction
floor_space_reduction.helper: Expected percentage reduction in manufacturing floor space due to compact FMS layout.

annual_floor_space_cost.label: Annual Floor Space Cost per sq ft
annual_floor_space_cost.placeholder: Enter annual floor space cost per sq ft
annual_floor_space_cost.helper: Annual cost per square foot of manufacturing space (rent, utilities, maintenance).

current_floor_space.label: Current Floor Space
current_floor_space.helper: Total manufacturing floor space currently occupied.

energy_cost_reduction.label: Energy Cost Reduction from FMS
energy_cost_reduction.placeholder: Enter energy cost reduction from fms
energy_cost_reduction.helper: Expected percentage reduction in energy costs due to more efficient equipment and reduced idle time.

annual_energy_cost.label: Annual Energy Cost
annual_energy_cost.helper: Total annual energy cost for the manufacturing facility.

maintenance_cost_increase.label: Maintenance Cost Increase from FMS
maintenance_cost_increase.placeholder: Enter maintenance cost increase from fms
maintenance_cost_increase.helper: Expected percentage increase in maintenance costs due to more complex equipment.

annual_maintenance_cost.label: Annual Maintenance Cost (current)
annual_maintenance_cost.helper: Current annual maintenance cost for existing equipment.

training_cost.label: Training Cost for FMS
training_cost.helper: One-time cost for training operators and maintenance staff on the new FMS.

implementation_time.label: Implementation Time
implementation_time.helper: Time required to fully implement the flexible manufacturing system.

production_days_per_year.label: Production Days per Year
production_days_per_year.helper: Number of days the facility operates per year.

shifts_per_day.label: Shifts per Day
shifts_per_day.helper: Number of production shifts per day.

total_production_kg.label: Total Production (kg)
total_production_kg.helper: Total weight of finished goods produced in the reporting period (ISO 14051 material flow).

waste_kg.label: Waste (kg)
waste_kg.helper: Total weight of food waste generated (including trim, spoilage, overproduction, and expired product).

selling_price_per_kg.label: Selling Price per kg
selling_price_per_kg.helper: Average revenue per kg of finished product sold (net of discounts).

cost_per_kg.label: Cost per kg
cost_per_kg.helper: Total variable cost per kg (raw materials, labor, energy, packaging).

waste_disposal_cost_per_kg.label: Waste Disposal Cost per kg
waste_disposal_cost_per_kg.placeholder: Enter waste disposal cost per kg
waste_disposal_cost_per_kg.helper: Cost to dispose of waste (landfill, composting, incineration).

rework_percentage.label: Rework Percentage
rework_percentage.helper: Percentage of production that requires rework (Lean Six Sigma defect rate).

labor_hourly_rate.label: Labor Hourly Rate
labor_hourly_rate.helper: Average fully loaded labor cost per hour (including benefits).

rework_hours_per_kg.label: Rework Hours per kg
rework_hours_per_kg.helper: Average labor hours required to rework one kg of product.

storage_cost_per_kg_per_day.label: Storage Cost per kg per Day
storage_cost_per_kg_per_day.placeholder: Enter storage cost per kg per day
storage_cost_per_kg_per_day.helper: Cost to store one kg of product per day (WERC warehousing metrics).

average_storage_days.label: Average Storage Days
average_storage_days.helper: Average number of days waste is held before disposal or rework.

waste_type.label: Waste Type
waste_type.helper: Primary category of waste (ISO 14051 waste classification).

include_hidden_costs.label: Include Hidden Costs (Energy, Water, Overhead)
include_hidden_costs.placeholder: Enter include hidden costs (energy, water, overhead)
include_hidden_costs.helper: If true, allocates a portion of fixed overhead to waste (activity-based costing).

numerator.label: Numerator
numerator.helper: The top part of the fraction (dividend). For mixed numbers, use the fractional part only.

denominator.label: Denominator
denominator.helper: The bottom part of the fraction (divisor). Must be non-zero.

wholenumber.label: Whole Number (for mixed fractions)
wholenumber.helper: Integer part of a mixed number (e.g., 3 in 3 1/4). Set to 0 for proper fractions.

decimalplaces.label: Decimal Places (precision)
decimalplaces.helper: Number of decimal places for the result. Follows ISO 80000-1 rounding rules.

roundingmethod.label: Rounding Method
roundingmethod.helper: Rounding rule per ISO 80000-1 (half_even recommended for statistical work).

uncertaintyinput.label: Measurement Uncertainty (±)
uncertaintyinput.helper: Absolute uncertainty in the numerator (e.g., from measurement tolerance). Used for Six Sigma uncertainty propagation.

planned_distance_km.label: Planned Route Distance
planned_distance_km.helper: Total distance of the planned route as per logistics plan.

actual_distance_km.label: Actual Route Distance
actual_distance_km.helper: Total distance actually driven, including deviations.

fuel_consumption_rate.label: Average Fuel Consumption Rate
fuel_consumption_rate.helper: Vehicle fuel consumption rate under standard conditions (ISO 14040).

fuel_price_per_liter.label: Fuel Price per Liter
fuel_price_per_liter.helper: Current market price of diesel or gasoline per liter.

load_weight_tonnes.label: Load Weight
load_weight_tonnes.helper: Total weight of cargo carried, affects fuel consumption.

terrain_factor.label: Terrain Type
terrain_factor.helper: Terrain classification affecting fuel efficiency (WERC guidelines).

traffic_condition.label: Traffic Condition
traffic_condition.helper: Traffic density impact on fuel consumption and route drift.

driver_behavior_score.label: Driver Behavior Score
driver_behavior_score.helper: Eco-driving score based on acceleration, braking, idling (Lean Six Sigma metric).

vehicle_age_years.label: Vehicle Age
vehicle_age_years.helper: Age of the vehicle, used for efficiency degradation factor.

include_hidden_losses.label: Include Hidden Loss Drivers
include_hidden_losses.helper: Toggle to include secondary loss factors like tire pressure, engine wear, etc.

defect_rate.label: Defect Rate (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts per million defective – Six Sigma quality metric. Lower is better.

throughput.label: Throughput (units/hour)
throughput.helper: Actual production rate per hour. Used to calculate OEE and capacity utilization.

planned_throughput.label: Planned Throughput (units/hour)
planned_throughput.helper: Target production rate per hour. Must be >0 to avoid division by zero.

cost_per_unit.label: Cost per Unit ($)
cost_per_unit.helper: Direct manufacturing cost per unit. Includes material, labor, overhead.

target_cost_per_unit.label: Target Cost per Unit ($)
target_cost_per_unit.helper: Budgeted or standard cost per unit. Must be >0.

safety_incidents.label: Safety Incidents (last 12 months)
safety_incidents.helper: Total recordable incidents per year. Lower is better (ISO 45001).

on_time_delivery_pct.label: On-Time Delivery (%)
on_time_delivery_pct.helper: Percentage of orders delivered on or before promised date. WERC metric.

shift_type.label: Shift Type
shift_type.helper: Shift pattern affects fatigue and error rates. Used in safety adjustment.

oee_override.label: Override OEE Calculation?
oee_override.helper: If true, user can manually enter OEE instead of computing from throughput.

manual_oee.label: Manual OEE (%)
manual_oee.helper: Overall Equipment Effectiveness if override is enabled.

deviation_type.label: Deviation Type
deviation_type.helper: Select the category of HACCP deviation to apply appropriate cost multipliers and regulatory thresholds.

affected_batch_kg.label: Affected Batch Weight (kg)
affected_batch_kg.helper: Total mass of product that was exposed to the deviation. Used to calculate material loss and rework costs.

unit_cost_per_kg.label: Unit Cost per kg ($)
unit_cost_per_kg.helper: Standard cost of raw materials per kilogram, including ingredients and packaging.

rework_percentage.label: Rework Percentage (%)
rework_percentage.helper: Estimated fraction of the affected batch that can be reworked (e.g., reprocessed, repackaged) instead of being scrapped.

rework_cost_per_kg.label: Rework Cost per kg ($)
rework_cost_per_kg.helper: Additional cost per kilogram for rework activities (labor, energy, extra materials).

downtime_hours.label: Downtime (hours)
downtime_hours.helper: Total production downtime caused by the deviation, including investigation, cleaning, and corrective actions.

hourly_overhead_rate.label: Hourly Overhead Rate ($/hr)
hourly_overhead_rate.helper: Burdened overhead cost per hour of production downtime (includes labor, utilities, facility costs).

regulatory_penalty_flag.label: Regulatory Penalty Applicable?
regulatory_penalty_flag.helper: Indicates if the deviation is likely to trigger a regulatory fine or citation (e.g., FDA, USDA).

base_penalty_amount.label: Base Penalty Amount ($)
base_penalty_amount.helper: Estimated base fine or penalty if regulatory action is taken. Used only when regulatory_penalty_flag is true.

recall_cost_flag.label: Recall Cost Included?
recall_cost_flag.helper: Check if the deviation requires a product recall, adding logistics, testing, and brand damage costs.

recall_fixed_cost.label: Recall Fixed Cost ($)
recall_fixed_cost.helper: Fixed cost associated with initiating a recall (notification, logistics, testing).

recall_variable_per_kg.label: Recall Variable Cost per kg ($/kg)
recall_variable_per_kg.placeholder: Enter recall variable cost per kg ($/kg)
recall_variable_per_kg.helper: Per-kilogram cost for recall handling (transport, disposal, replacement).

data_confidence.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
data_confidence.helper: Subjective confidence in the accuracy of input data (0 = low, 1 = high). Used to adjust the final cost estimate.

design_ua.label: Design Overall Heat Transfer Coefficient × Area (UA_design)
design_ua.placeholder: Enter design overall heat transfer coefficient × area (ua_design)
design_ua.helper: Clean design UA from manufacturer datasheet or initial commissioning test (ISO 50001:2018, Annex B).

actual_ua.label: Actual Overall Heat Transfer Coefficient × Area (UA_actual)
actual_ua.placeholder: Enter actual overall heat transfer coefficient × area (ua_actual)
actual_ua.helper: Current measured UA from process data (temperature, flow) using heat balance. Indicates fouling severity.

hot_inlet_temp.label: Hot Fluid Inlet Temperature
hot_inlet_temp.helper: Temperature of hot process stream entering the heat exchanger.

cold_inlet_temp.label: Cold Fluid Inlet Temperature
cold_inlet_temp.helper: Temperature of cooling or heating utility entering the exchanger.

hot_flow_rate.label: Hot Fluid Mass Flow Rate
hot_flow_rate.placeholder: Enter hot fluid mass flow rate
hot_flow_rate.helper: Mass flow rate of the hot process stream.

hot_specific_heat.label: Hot Fluid Specific Heat Capacity
hot_specific_heat.placeholder: Enter hot fluid specific heat capacity
hot_specific_heat.helper: Average specific heat of hot fluid over operating temperature range.

energy_cost.label: Energy Cost
energy_cost.helper: Cost of thermal energy (steam, hot water, or electricity for pumping).

operating_hours_per_year.label: Operating Hours per Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Annual operating hours of the heat exchanger.

production_loss_factor.label: Production Loss Factor
production_loss_factor.helper: Percentage of production capacity lost due to reduced heat transfer (e.g., slower throughput).

revenue_per_unit_product.label: Revenue per Unit Product
revenue_per_unit_product.helper: Revenue generated per kg of product processed through the exchanger.

exchanger_type.label: Heat Exchanger Type
exchanger_type.helper: Type of heat exchanger; affects fouling factors and cleaning intervals.

fouling_factor_known.label: Fouling Factor Known?
fouling_factor_known.helper: If true, user provides measured fouling factor directly; otherwise calculated from UA ratio.

measured_fouling_factor.label: Measured Fouling Factor (R_f)
measured_fouling_factor.helper: Directly measured fouling resistance from test or literature (TEMA standards).

horsepower.label: Horsepower (HP)
horsepower.helper: Mechanical power rating of motor or engine. Typical range for industrial motors: 0.5–5000 hp.

hp_type.label: Horsepower Type
hp_type.helper: Different horsepower definitions affect conversion factor. Mechanical HP = 745.7 W, Metric HP = 735.5 W, Electrical HP = 746 W.

motor_efficiency.label: Motor Efficiency
motor_efficiency.helper: Efficiency of the motor at rated load. Typical IE3 motors: 90–95%, IE4: 95–97%.

load_factor.label: Load Factor
load_factor.helper: Percentage of rated load at which the motor operates. Underloaded motors reduce efficiency.

power_factor.label: Power Factor
power_factor.helper: Ratio of real power to apparent power. Typical industrial motors: 0.8–0.95 lagging.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Operating Hours per Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Annual runtime for energy cost calculations. Common values: 2000 (single shift), 4000 (two shifts), 8000 (continuous).

electricity_cost_per_kwh.label: Electricity Cost
electricity_cost_per_kwh.helper: Average industrial electricity rate. Range: $0.05–$0.30 in most regions.

cooling_load.label: Cooling Load
cooling_load.helper: Total sensible and latent heat load from building, equipment, and occupants (ISO 52000).

heating_load.label: Heating Load
heating_load.helper: Total heat loss from building envelope and ventilation (ASHRAE Handbook).

system_type.label: System Type
system_type.helper: HVAC system configuration affecting capacity and efficiency curves.

ambient_temperature.label: Ambient Temperature
ambient_temperature.helper: Outdoor dry-bulb temperature for design conditions (ISO 15927).

relative_humidity.label: Relative Humidity
relative_humidity.helper: Indoor relative humidity setpoint, impacts latent load and coil performance.

efficiency_ratio.label: Efficiency Ratio (EER/COP)
efficiency_ratio.helper: Current system efficiency; baseline for improvement (ANSI/AHRI 210/240).

airflow_rate.label: Airflow Rate
airflow_rate.helper: Supply air volume, critical for capacity and distribution (WERC DC guidelines).

duct_leakage_factor.label: Duct Leakage Factor
duct_leakage_factor.helper: Estimated leakage as percentage of total airflow; affects effective capacity.

occupancy_density.label: Occupancy Density
occupancy_density.helper: People per square meter, impacts internal heat gain (ASHRAE 62.1).

is_preventive_maintenance_active.label: Preventive Maintenance Active
is_preventive_maintenance_active.helper: Indicates if PM schedule is followed; affects degradation factor.

flow_rate.label: Flow Rate
flow_rate.helper: Volumetric flow rate of hydraulic fluid through the system. Typical range for industrial systems: 10-500 L/min.

pressure_drop_total.label: Total Pressure Drop
pressure_drop_total.helper: Sum of all pressure losses across components (pipes, valves, fittings). ISO 4409 recommends measurement at steady state.

fluid_density.label: Fluid Density
fluid_density.helper: Density of hydraulic fluid at operating temperature. Typical mineral oil: 850-900 kg/m³.

kinematic_viscosity.label: Kinematic Viscosity
kinematic_viscosity.helper: Fluid viscosity at operating temperature. ISO VG 46 is common for industrial hydraulics.

pipe_length.label: Total Pipe Length
pipe_length.helper: Total length of hydraulic piping in the system. Longer runs increase friction losses.

pipe_diameter.label: Pipe Inner Diameter
pipe_diameter.helper: Inner diameter of the main hydraulic pipe. Affects flow velocity and Reynolds number.

valve_count.label: Number of Valves
valve_count.helper: Total number of directional, pressure, and flow control valves in the system.

fitting_count.label: Number of Fittings
fitting_count.helper: Total number of elbows, tees, reducers, and other fittings.

system_type.label: System Type
system_type.helper: Application type influences typical loss factors and maintenance intervals.

is_new_system.label: New System (less than 1 year in service)
is_new_system.placeholder: Enter new system (less than 1 year in service)
is_new_system.helper: New systems may have different loss characteristics due to break-in period.

base_cost.label: Base Cost (Current Period)
base_cost.helper: Total cost of goods or services at the start of the analysis period.

inflation_rate.label: Annual Inflation Rate
inflation_rate.helper: Expected annual inflation rate for the cost category (e.g., CPI, PPI).

period_years.label: Analysis Period (Years)
period_years.helper: Number of years over which inflation escalation is calculated.

escalation_method.label: Escalation Method
escalation_method.helper: Method to apply inflation: compound (annual compounding), simple (linear), or stepwise (discrete annual steps).

include_energy.label: Include Energy Cost Escalation
include_energy.helper: If true, applies a separate energy escalation factor (typically higher than general inflation).

energy_escalation_rate.label: Energy Escalation Rate
energy_escalation_rate.helper: Annual escalation rate for energy costs, often based on EIA forecasts.

labor_productivity_gain.label: Labor Productivity Gain
labor_productivity_gain.helper: Annual productivity improvement that offsets labor cost inflation (Lean / Six Sigma metric).

material_volatility_index.label: Material Volatility Index
material_volatility_index.helper: Multiplier to adjust material inflation based on commodity volatility (e.g., copper, steel).

current_rate.label: Current Interest Rate (%)
current_rate.helper: The prevailing market interest rate for the reference period.

rate_change.label: Expected Rate Change (bps)
rate_change.helper: Anticipated shift in interest rate in basis points (1 bps = 0.01%).

portfolio_value.label: Portfolio Value (USD)
portfolio_value.helper: Total notional value of the fixed-income portfolio.

duration.label: Modified Duration (years)
duration.helper: Sensitivity of bond price to yield changes, adjusted for yield.

convexity.label: Convexity
convexity.helper: Second-order measure of curvature in price-yield relationship.

hedge_ratio.label: Hedge Ratio (%)
hedge_ratio.helper: Percentage of portfolio hedged using derivatives or swaps.

confidence_level.label: Confidence Level
confidence_level.helper: Statistical confidence for VaR and tail risk estimation.

volatility_regime.label: Volatility Regime
volatility_regime.helper: Market volatility environment for stress testing.

avg_inventory_value.label: Average Inventory Value (USD)
avg_inventory_value.helper: Total average value of inventory over the period (e.g., monthly average of COGS-based inventory).

cogs_annual.label: Annual Cost of Goods Sold (USD)
cogs_annual.placeholder: Enter annual cost of goods sold (usd)
cogs_annual.helper: Total cost of goods sold over the last 12 months.

demand_variability_coefficient.label: Demand Variability Coefficient (CV)
demand_variability_coefficient.helper: Coefficient of variation of monthly demand (standard deviation / mean). Higher values indicate greater unpredictability.

obsolescence_rate.label: Obsolescence Rate (% per year)
obsolescence_rate.helper: Annual percentage of inventory value that becomes obsolete or expired.

carrying_cost_rate.label: Inventory Carrying Cost Rate (% per year)
carrying_cost_rate.placeholder: Enter inventory carrying cost rate (% per year)
carrying_cost_rate.helper: Annual cost to hold inventory (storage, insurance, capital, etc.) as a percentage of inventory value.

lead_time_days.label: Average Lead Time (Days)
lead_time_days.helper: Average replenishment lead time from order placement to receipt.

service_level_target.label: Service Level Target (%)
service_level_target.helper: Target fill rate or cycle service level (e.g., 95% = 0.95).

inventory_accuracy_pct.label: Inventory Record Accuracy (%)
inventory_accuracy_pct.helper: Percentage of inventory records matching physical counts (cycle count accuracy).

industry_benchmark_turnover.label: Industry Benchmark Turnover (turns/year)
industry_benchmark_turnover.helper: Expected turnover rate for the industry (e.g., WERC benchmark).

initial_investment.label: Initial Investment
initial_investment.helper: Total upfront capital expenditure (CapEx) for the project or asset.

annual_cash_inflow.label: Annual Cash Inflow
annual_cash_inflow.helper: Expected net cash inflow per year (revenue minus operating costs).

project_life_years.label: Project Life (Years)
project_life_years.helper: Duration over which cash flows are projected.

discount_rate.label: Discount Rate (WACC)
discount_rate.helper: Weighted average cost of capital or required rate of return.

terminal_value.label: Terminal Value
terminal_value.helper: Residual value at end of project life (e.g., salvage, resale).

cash_flow_variability.label: Cash Flow Variability
cash_flow_variability.helper: Risk level affecting confidence in cash flow estimates (low = ±5%, medium = ±15%, high = ±30%).

lean_six_sigma_adjustment.label: Lean Six Sigma Adjustment
lean_six_sigma_adjustment.helper: If enabled, applies a 2% reduction to cash flows to account for process waste and variation (Lean Six Sigma standard).

total_energy_consumption.label: Total Energy Consumption
total_energy_consumption.helper: Total energy consumed by the organization in the baseline period (e.g., one year).

production_volume.label: Production Volume
production_volume.helper: Total production output in the baseline period (e.g., number of products, tons, or other relevant unit).

heating_degree_days.label: Heating Degree Days (HDD)
heating_degree_days.helper: Annual heating degree days for the facility location, used to normalize weather-related energy use.

cooling_degree_days.label: Cooling Degree Days (CDD)
cooling_degree_days.helper: Annual cooling degree days for the facility location, used to normalize weather-related energy use.

operating_hours.label: Operating Hours
operating_hours.helper: Total hours the facility operated during the baseline period.

energy_source_mix.label: Energy Source Mix
energy_source_mix.helper: Primary energy sources used, affecting emission factors and normalization.

baseline_type.label: Baseline Type
baseline_type.helper: Type of baseline per ISO 50001:2018 clause 6.3.

use_weather_normalization.label: Apply Weather Normalization
use_weather_normalization.helper: If true, adjusts energy consumption for heating and cooling degree days.

use_production_normalization.label: Apply Production Normalization
use_production_normalization.helper: If true, adjusts energy consumption for production volume.

labor_rate.label: Labor Rate (per hour)
labor_rate.helper: Average fully loaded labor cost per operator hour, including wages, benefits, and overhead. Based on industry benchmarks (BLS, ISO 9001:2015 clause 7.1.6).

operators_affected.label: Number of Operators Affected
operators_affected.helper: Number of direct operators whose work is impacted by the Kaizen event. Used to calculate labor savings.

time_saved_per_operator.label: Time Saved per Operator per Shift
time_saved_per_operator.placeholder: Enter time saved per operator per shift
time_saved_per_operator.helper: Reduction in cycle time or non-value-added time per operator per shift, measured via time studies (Lean standard work, ISO 22400).

shifts_per_day.label: Shifts per Day
shifts_per_day.helper: Number of production shifts per day. Typical in manufacturing (WERC DC Measures).

operating_days_per_year.label: Operating Days per Year
operating_days_per_year.helper: Annual operating days, excluding weekends and holidays. Standard for industrial planning (ISO 9001).

defect_rate_before.label: Defect Rate Before Kaizen
defect_rate_before.helper: Percentage of defective units before improvement. Six Sigma DMAIC baseline (DPMO conversion).

defect_rate_after.label: Defect Rate After Kaizen
defect_rate_after.helper: Percentage of defective units after improvement. Must be <= defect_rate_before for valid savings.

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production Volume
annual_production_volume.helper: Total units produced per year. Used to scale defect savings.

cost_per_defect.label: Cost per Defect
cost_per_defect.helper: Average cost of rework, scrap, warranty, and inspection per defective unit (COPQ, ISO 9001:2015 clause 9.1.3).

material_cost_savings.label: Material Cost Savings (annual)
material_cost_savings.helper: Direct material savings from waste reduction, scrap reduction, or better yield. Enter 0 if not applicable.

energy_cost_savings.label: Energy Cost Savings (annual)
energy_cost_savings.helper: Energy savings from process improvements (ISO 50001, Lean energy). Enter 0 if not applicable.

implementation_cost.label: Implementation Cost (one-time)
implementation_cost.helper: Total cost to implement the Kaizen (training, equipment, downtime). Used for ROI calculation.

sustainability_factor.label: Sustainability Factor
sustainability_factor.helper: Confidence that savings will persist over time. Low = 0.7, Medium = 0.85, High = 1.0. Based on Lean sustainability audits.

data_confidence.label: Data Confidence Level
data_confidence.helper: Quality of input data. Low = 0.8, Medium = 0.9, High = 1.0. Affects adjusted savings.

mass_kg.label: Mass in Kilograms
mass_kg.helper: Input mass value in kilograms for conversion to pounds. Used in logistics, manufacturing, and trade.

precision_level.label: Precision Level
precision_level.helper: Select number of decimal places for output rounding, per ISO 80000-1 rounding rules.

use_industry_rounding.label: Use Industry Rounding (WERC)
use_industry_rounding.helper: Apply WERC standard rounding (0.5 up) for trade compliance.

measurement_uncertainty.label: Measurement Uncertainty (%)
measurement_uncertainty.helper: Estimated uncertainty in the input measurement, used for confidence adjustment (ISO/IEC Guide 98-3).

mass_lbs.label: Mass in Pounds (lb)
